channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Universities defiant on Trump's academic excellence compact as feedback deadline passes
item.description: Seven universities reject Trump's education compact citing academic freedom concerns. Schools worry federal funding tied to policies would undermine autonomy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: By the Numbers: Why trick-or-treaters may bag more gummy candy than chocolate this Halloween
item.description: Ghouls, goblins … and gummy bears. Trick-or-treaters may find more fruity candy than chocolate among their Halloween handouts this year.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What is 'ghost tapping?' New scheme targeting tap-to-pay users
item.description: The Better Business Bureau is warning tap-to-pay users of a new scheme that could make simple transactions costly.
item.dc:creator: Katlyn Fernandez, NewsNation

item.title: Historic libraries bring modern comfort to book lovers and history buffs in New England
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — When David Arsenault takes down a worn, leather-bound 19th-century book from the winding shelves of the Boston Athenaeum, he feels a sense of awe — like he’s handling an artifact in a museum.
item.dc:creator: LEAH WILLINGHAM and KIMBERLEE KRUESI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Thailand's Queen Mother Sirikit has died at age 93
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Thailand’s Queen Mother Sirikit, who supervised royal projects to help the rural poor, preserve traditional craft-making and protect the environment, died on Friday. She was 93.
item.dc:creator: DENIS D. GRAY, JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI and TIAN MACLEOD JI, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Grandmothers in Colombia get the quinceañera they never had
item.description: BOGOTÁ, Colombia (AP) — At age 72, Rosalba Casas finally celebrated her 15th birthday on Friday, donning a flowing pink dress and a tiara for the quinceañera she dreamed of as a teenager.
item.dc:creator: ASTRID SUÁREZ, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump speaks at tele-rally to boost GOP's chances in governor's race in New Jersey
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump urged his supporters in New Jersey late Friday to cast a ballot for the Republican candidate for governor, Jack Ciattarelli, before early voting starts in the state on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 5 shot near Howard University homecoming week; 2 people in custody
item.description: Five people were hospitalized after a shooting near Howard University Friday, according to the DC Fire and EMS Department.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlyn Dillon, WGN 9

item.title: 5 shot near Howard University homecoming week; 2 people in custody
item.description: Five people were hospitalized after a shooting near Howard University Friday, according to the DC Fire and EMS Department.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlyn Dillon, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Walmart is changing how hourly store workers earn raises
item.description: The retail giant's new approach will take employee performance into account as well as years of service.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DA seeks death penalty against two in Kansas moms' killings
item.description: An Oklahoma prosecutor is seeking the death penalty against two men charged in the deaths of Veronica Butler and Jilian Kelley.
item.dc:creator: Wil Day, NewsNation

item.title: 3 convicted for illegal BASE jumping in Yosemite
item.description: Three people have been convicted of illegal BASE jumping in Yosemite National Park in recent weeks, the park announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: John Houghton, Fox 5

item.title: Thousands of curling irons recalled amid burn injuries
item.description: Thousands of curling irons sold at popular retailers, including on Amazon, are being recalled after reports of the curling iron barrel detaching, posing a burn risk.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 7 charged in 2024 Pennsylvania voter registration fraud that prosecutors say was motivated by money
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — A yearlong investigation into suspected fraudulent voter registration forms submitted ahead of last year's presidential election produced criminal charges Friday against six street canvassers and the man who led their work in Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: MARK SCOLFORO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Jeffries endorses Mamdani in New York City mayor's race
item.description: Just hours before the start of New York’s early voting, Jeffries broke that silence by endorsing the controversial candidate.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Mafia returns to center stage in NBA betting scandal that included rigged poker games
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Decades after a crackdown by prosecutors decimated the ranks of the New York Mafia, the indictment of an NBA coach, a player and nearly three dozen others in a betting scandal highlighted the mob's persistence and adaptability to changing times and technology.
item.dc:creator: ADAM GELLER and LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How Hispanics' views of Trump have changed since January, according to a new AP-NORC poll
item.description: President Donald Trump's favorability has fallen among Hispanic adults since the beginning of the year, a new AP-NORC poll shows, a potential warning sign from a key constituency that helped secure his victory in the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: US inflation stays elevated but prices rose less than feared last month
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — U.S. inflation remained elevated last month as gas prices jumped while the cost of rents cooled, painting a mixed picture of the expenses consumers are facing in a murky economy where growth appears steady but hiring slow.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER RUGABER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dashcam video shows deadly freeway crash involving suspected illegal immigrant trucker
item.description: Federal officials warned California about truck license compliance issues before deadly freeway crash involving suspected illegal immigrant driver killed three.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US expands facial recognition at border, airports
item.description: Facial recognition technology will be expanded for U.S. border authorities to require non-citizens to be photographed at airports, seaports, and border land crossings.
item.dc:creator: Ted Hesson, NewsNation

item.title: PHOTOS: Thieves cut through roof, steal hundreds of shoes in Florida mall heist
item.description: Florida authorities are searching for suspects who investigators said pulled off an elaborate heist to steal thousands of dollars in shoes from a Martin County mall this week.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Unger, KRON4

item.title: Ontario premier says he'll pull ad that upset Trump so trade talks between Canada and US can resume
item.description: The leader of Canada’s most populous province says he’ll pull the anti-tariff ad that prompted U.S. President Donald Trump to end trade talks with Canada.
item.dc:creator: Rob Gillies, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Social Security Administration announces 2.8% cost-of-living adjustment
item.description: Social Security and Supplemental Security Income (SSI) benefits will rise 2.8 percent in 2026 after the annual cost-of-living adjustment (COLA), the federal government announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: Sylvan Lane, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Here's what the White House lost with the East Wing's demolition
item.description: The East Wing's razing was met with criticism both by preservationists and by over half of the American public.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mancini, WGN 9

item.title: Shots fired, driver hurt and held after truck rams into Coast Guard base in California
item.description: Law enforcement officers have fired shots at a vehicle that backed into a U.S. Coast Guard base in the San Francisco Bay Area that had been the site of protests against federal immigration agents.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Louisiana man arrested in child porn investigation
item.description: A 21-year-old Shreveport man was arrested and faces ten charges related to the possession of juvenile pornography after a search warrant was executed at his residence.
item.dc:creator: Erykah Agers, NewsNation

item.title: Louisiana jury awards more than $40 million to family of man who died in privately-run jail
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — A federal jury found a private company running a Louisiana jail liable for the 2015 death of a man who died of head injuries he received while in custody, and awarded the family more than $40 million in damages. Attorneys representing Erie Moore Sr.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Illegal immigrant truck driver in fatal California crash should never have had license: DOT report
item.description: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy released a bombshell report on Thursday alleging that an Indian national involved in a fatal crash in California should have never had a license.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Where the jewels stolen from the Louvre Museum might end up
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Just days after a stunning heist at the Louvre Museum in Paris, speculation is growing around where the lavish, stolen jewels that once adorned France's royals might end up.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS and R.J. RICO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 5 times the White House underwent major renovations
item.description: President Trump's construction of a grand ballroom attached to the White House — starting with the demolition of part of the East Wing this week — will not be the first time a president has left a lasting mark on the people's house.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: White House releases donor list for Trump ballroom amid East Wing demolition
item.description: Amazon, Apple, Google and other major companies are among those donating to help cover the cost of President Trump's massive new ballroom at the White House. The White House confirmed the list to The Hill amid demolition of the East Wing to make room for the ballroom.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, ABC 4

item.title: Trail Blazers’ Billups, Heat’s Rozier among dozens charged in Mafia-linked gambling probe
item.description: Portland Trail Blazers head coach Chauncey Billups and Miami Heat guard Terry Rozier are among more than 30 people who have been charged in connection with schemes involving illegal sports betting and rigged poker games backed by Mafia, authorities said on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Here's where the jewels stolen from the Louvre Museum might end up
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Just days after a stunning heist at the Louvre Museum in Paris, speculation is growing around where the lavish, stolen jewels that once adorned France's royals might end up.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Wyoming Capitol bomb investigators focus on men seen in security video
item.description: CHEYENNE, Wyo. (AP) — Investigators in Wyoming sought to identify two men they believe left a homemade bomb in front of the state Capitol, causing the building's evacuation after a passerby found the object and brought it inside. The bomb, at a time of heightened political angst in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MEAD GRUVER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: COVID-19 vaccines may help some cancer patients fight tumors
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The most widely used COVID-19 vaccines may offer a surprise benefit for some cancer patients – revving up their immune systems to help fight tumors.
item.dc:creator: LAURAN NEERGAARD, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The Latest: North Carolina lawmakers approve map adding a GOP House seat
item.description: North Carolina lawmakers gave final approval Wednesday to a revised U.S. House map backed by President Donald Trump that is intended to help Republicans win an additional seat in next year’s elections. The new congressional map reshapes the state’s only current swing district, held by Democratic U.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: USDA is reopening some 2,100 offices to help farmers access $3B in aid despite the ongoing shutdown
item.description: The Agriculture Department will reopen about 2,100 county offices all across the country Thursday despite the ongoing government shutdown to help farmers and ranchers get access to $3 billion of aid from existing programs.
item.dc:creator: JOSH FUNK, Associated Press, ABC 4
